name: Title Search
description: Research property ownership, liens, encumbrances, and tax status. Verify chain of title.

name: File Complaint
description: Prepare and file the foreclosure complaint (judicial) or notice of default (non-judicial) with the court.

name: Serve Borrower
description: Serve the borrower and all named defendants with the complaint and summons via process server.

name: Obtain Judgment
description: Obtain a judgment of foreclosure from the court authorizing the sale of the property.

name: Schedule Sale
description: Schedule the foreclosure sale date, coordinate publication requirements, and notify all parties.

name: Conduct Sale
description: Conduct the foreclosure auction, process bids, and file the certificate of sale.
